subcodes.first_line: O thou who art denoted by the letters Ha and Sin! Thy word hath attained unto the presence of the Throne, and thy mention hath been recorded in this exalted station, and We make mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س قد حضرت کلمه من خطک لدی العرش و ذکر ذکرک فی هذا المقام المنیع و ذکرناک
